debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
i j : ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
hi : i ∈ u
hj : j ∈ u
⊢ map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P

failed_attempts:
by
    have h1 : Measure.map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s => i ∈ s) Ber(u, p) := by
      rw [hX.map_eq_law]
      exact (Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) hX.aemeasurable).symm
    have h2 : Measure.map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s => j ∈ s) Ber(u, p) := by
      rw [hX.map_eq_law]
      exact (Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) hX.aemeasurable).symm
    rw [h1, h2]
    congr 1
    rw [bernoulliOn_eq_map, Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop),
        bernoulliOn_eq_map, Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    congr 1
    ext f
    simp only [Function.comp_apply, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    congr 1
    ext k
    simp only [hi, hj]

by
    have h1 : Measure.map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s => i ∈ s) Ber(u, p) := by
      rw [hX.map_eq_law]
      rfl
    have h2 : Measure.map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s => j ∈ s) Ber(u, p) := by
      rw [hX.map_eq_law]
      rfl
    rw [h1, h2]
    simp only [bernoulliOn_eq_map]
    rw [Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    congr 1
    ext t
    simp only [Function.comp_apply, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    have : (fun x => i ∈ {i | x i}) = (fun x => x i) := by ext; simp
    have : (fun x => j ∈ {i | x i}) = (fun x => x j) := by ext; simp
    simp only [Function.comp_apply, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    rw [infinitePi_proj, infinitePi_proj]
    simp [hi, hj]

by
    have h1 : Measure.map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s => i ∈ s) Ber(u, p) :=
      hX.map_eq_map_law (f := fun s => i ∈ s) (by fun_prop)
    have h2 : Measure.map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s => j ∈ s) Ber(u, p) :=
      hX.map_eq_map_law (f := fun s => j ∈ s) (by fun_prop)
    rw [h1, h2]
    congr 1
    ext S _
    simp only [bernoulliOn_apply']
    congr 1
    ext f
    simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    constructor <;> intro hf
    · convert hf using 1
      ext a
      simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      constructor <;> intro ha
      · by_cases hai : a = i
        · subst hai; exact ⟨hj, hf⟩
        · exact ⟨ha.1, ha.2⟩
      · by_cases haj : a = j
        · subst haj; exact ⟨hi, hf⟩
        · exact ⟨ha.1, ha.2⟩
    · convert hf using 1
      ext a
      simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      constructor <;> intro ha
      · by_cases haj : a = j
        · subst haj; exact ⟨hi, hf⟩
        · exact ⟨ha.1, ha.2⟩
      · by_cases hai : a = i
        · subst hai; exact ⟨hj, hf⟩
        · exact ⟨ha.1, ha.2⟩

by
    have h1 : Measure.map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s => i ∈ s) Ber(u, p) := by
      rw [hX.law_eq]
      exact (Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) hX.aemeasurable).symm
    have h2 : Measure.map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s => j ∈ s) Ber(u, p) := by
      rw [hX.law_eq]
      exact (Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) hX.aemeasurable).symm
    rw [h1, h2]
    congr 1
    rw [bernoulliOn_eq_map, Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop),
        bernoulliOn_eq_map, Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    congr 1
    ext f
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    constructor <;> intro hf
    · simpa [hi] using hf i
    · simpa [hj] using hf j

by
    have h1 : P.map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) = Ber(u, p).map (fun s => i ∈ s) := by
      rw [← Measure.map_map (measurable_mem i) hX.aemeasurable, hX.law]
    have h2 : P.map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) = Ber(u, p).map (fun s => j ∈ s) := by
      rw [← Measure.map_map (measurable_mem j) hX.aemeasurable, hX.law]
    rw [h1, h2, bernoulliOn_eq_map, bernoulliOn_eq_map]
    simp only [Measure.map_map (measurable_mem _) (MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable)]
    congr 1
    ext S
    simp only [Measure.map_apply (measurable_mem _) (measurableSet_of_countable _),
      Set.preimage, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    congr 1
    ext f
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    constructor <;> intro hf <;> convert hf using 1 <;> simp [hi, hj]

by
    have h1 : Measure.map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s => i ∈ s) Ber(u, p) :=
      hX.map_eq_map_law measurable_setOf_mem.aemeasurable
    have h2 : Measure.map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s => j ∈ s) Ber(u, p) :=
      hX.map_eq_map_law measurable_setOf_mem.aemeasurable
    rw [h1, h2]
    simp only [bernoulliOn_eq_map]
    rw [Measure.map_map measurable_setOf_mem.aemeasurable (Measurable.aemeasurable (by fun_prop))]
    rw [Measure.map_map measurable_setOf_mem.aemeasurable (Measurable.aemeasurable (by fun_prop))]
    congr 1
    ext f
    simp only [Function.comp_apply, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    have : (toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) =
           (toNNReal p • dirac (j ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) := by simp [hi, hj]
    convert infinitePi_proj (fun i => toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False) i
      {f} using 1
    · simp [infinitePi_cylinder _ (.singleton _)]
    · rw [this]
      simp [infinitePi_cylinder _ (.singleton _)]

    have h1 : Measure.map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s => i ∈ s) Ber(u, p) := by

    have h2 : Measure.map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s => j ∈ s) Ber(u, p) := by

    rw [h1, h2]
    simp only [bernoulliOn_eq_map, Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
    congr 1
    ext k
    simp only [Function.comp_apply, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    constructor <;> (intro h; convert h using 1; simp [hi, hj])

by
    have h1 : Measure.map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s => i ∈ s) Ber(u, p) := by
      rw [hX.map_eq_law]
      rfl
    have h2 : Measure.map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P = Measure.map (fun s => j ∈ s) Ber(u, p) := by
